title: Chronic Disease Self Management Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Chronic Disease Self Management Programs 11 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS CHRONIC CARE MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term care (up to 90 days) to patients with asthma, diabetes, high blood pressure, and depression. After 90 days, the patient is assigned to a primary care provider that can continue working with them. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: Uninsured adults age 18 and older Hours: Tuesday 9am-noon, Wednesday 5pm-8pm, Thursday noon-3pm Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE FAMILY YMCA YMCA'S DIABETES PREVENTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The YMCA's Diabetes Prevention Program is a year-long program consisting of 25 classroom sessions. A trained Lifestyle Coach helps participants learn strategies for healthy eating, physical activity, and other lifestyle changes. 600 E 24th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who are overweight with a BMI greater than or equal to 25 and diagnosed with prediabetes or at high risk for diabetes Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 686-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTH BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic primary care, including women’s health exams such as breast exams and Pap tests, care for chronic conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes, treatment for minor illnesses and injuries, and immunizations. Does not provide care for medical emergencies. 714 NE Alberta Street Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Ages 18-64 who have Oregon Health Plan (OHP) with a primary focus on African American community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm by appointment only Email (503) 287-4932 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects older adults with services that allow them to remain safely in their homes and communities (elder law, home maintenance and minor repair services, housekeeping assistance, Medicare counseling, housing information and referral, advocacy, and senior ride program). Services include Oregon Project Independence Services (OPI) and community resources. Additionally offers short-term case management (Options Counseling) and chronic disease management. 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Age 60 and older with a focus on the African-American community Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND COMMUNITY HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Trains and employs members of the Black community to help navigate complex healthcare systems, connect people to health insurance, manage and prevent chronic disease, and provide peer-delivered services for those in recovery. Builds individual and community capability by increasing health knowledge, empowering participants to advocate for themselves, and encouraging them to speak up and ask for what they need to make the best decisions about their health 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the African American community Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC COASTAL FAMILY HEALTH CENTER CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education and tools to empower participants to better manage their condition and lead healthier lives. Topics include nutrition, exercise, and communication. 2275 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: YVFWC Patients Hours: Monday-Friday 6pm-8:30pm Email (503) 325-8315 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER OF CLATSKANIE CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education and tools to empower participants to better manage their condition and lead healthier lives. Topics include nutrition, exercise, and communication. 401 SW Bel Air Drive Clatskanie, OR 97016 Eligibility: YVFWC Patients Hours: Monday-Friday 6pm-8:30pm Email (503) 728-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC LANCASTER FAMILY HEALTH CENTER AT BEVERLY CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education and tools to empower participants to better manage their condition and lead healthier lives. Topics include nutrition, exercise, and communication. 3896 Beverly Avenue NE Suite 40 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: YVFWC Patients Hours: Monday-Friday 6pm-8:30pm (509) 225-3396 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC MIRASOL FAMILY HEALTH CENTER CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education and tools to empower participants to better manage their condition and lead healthier lives. Topics include nutrition, exercise, and communication. 3530 SE 88th Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: YVFWC Patients Hours: Monday-Friday 6pm-8:30pm Email (503) 772-4335 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC SALUD MEDICAL CENTER CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education and tools to empower participants to better manage their condition and lead healthier lives. Topics include nutrition, exercise, and communication. 1175 Mt Hood Avenue Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: YVFWC Patients Hours: Monday-Friday 6pm-8:30pm Email (503) 982-2000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YMCA OF BAKER COUNTY ADULT AND SENIOR PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of programs to improve the health of adults and seniors, including group fitness classes and group sports. Also offers a diabetes prevention program and support/instruction for adults with Parkinson's and other neurological diseases. Members have open use of the swim center and fitness center. 3715 Pocahontas Road Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service (541) 523-8328 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE FAMILY YMCA YMCA'S DIABETES PREVENTION PROGRAM NORTH BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC CHRONIC DISEASE AND DIABETES SELF-MANAGEMENT YMCA OF BAKER COUNTY ADULT AND SENIOR PROGRAMS
